[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111011001 6
1 011110000 4
2 011001101 5
3 111010111 7
4 001011111 6
5 001011101 5
6 101111011 7
7 111111011 8
